query: hello i would like to know please if when i book the flight for the work i can use my own miles to make the upgrade to the better seat or this is no allowed um thank you so much

label_note: 'Why is my booking out of policy?' explains the out-of-policy flag and justification flow that a hotel above cap triggers.

Second, does the company travel insurance still cover me during those personal days, or only the work days? Thank you so much.
